seo.title: Membership & Curation Channels | HeartLink
seo.description: Explore HeartLink's four private curation channels. Participation is by invitation only and cannot be purchased directly.

hero.title: Access is considered. Never purchased.
hero.description: HeartLink does not sell memberships from a rate card. Following a private review, each accepted family is placed within the channel best suited to the scope and complexity of the mandate.

tiers.label: Channel 01 · Foundational
tiers.title: The Registry Network
tiers.description: For considered individuals invited into HeartLink’s protected active circle, with founder-reviewed profile curation and selective introductions.

tiers.label: Channel 02 · Guided
tiers.title: The Success Tier
tiers.description: For those seeking a more actively guided path, with expanded search stewardship and advisory support through emerging courtship.

tiers.label: Channel 03 · Comprehensive
tiers.title: The Premium Circle
tiers.description: A whole-family mandate encompassing deep curation, relationship counsel and family integration from first consideration through commitment.

tiers.label: Channel 04 · Bespoke
tiers.title: The Black Tier
tiers.description: HeartLink’s most discreet and exacting global search, reserved for mandates requiring exceptional privacy, reach and principal-level attention.

protocol.title: There is no “buy now” in a decision this consequential.
paragraphs: An invitation reflects mutual suitability: your readiness for the process, our ability to serve the mandate with integrity, and the current composition of the active registry.
Financial terms are discussed privately only after the appropriate curation channel has been established. Payment can never secure acceptance.

closing.quote: Begin with an introduction, not a biodata sheet.
